_README: CRITICAL: This NVR's burned-in OSD timestamps are NOT real IST. The clock was hand-set to UTC and runs ~8 min slow, with NTP disabled (timeMode=manual). All recorded timestamps run ~5h38m BEHIND true IST. To request footage for a desired real-IST time T, use RTSP starttime = T - true_ist_minus_osd_seconds. After processing, add the same offset back to convert OSD media time -> real IST for reporting.

verified_visually.osd_12:30: store OPEN, staff inside, evening daylight  => ~18:08 IST
verified_visually.osd_18:00: security shutter DOWN, store closed         => ~23:38 IST

action_item: Showroom should set NVR clock to IST and enable NTP so future recordings are correctly stamped. Does NOT affect already-recorded Jun-3 footage (offset is applied in software).
